case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC VS. MARGARET LEWIS

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award, Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
